bead.title: test(svelte): add layout.e2e.ts smoke spec covering NavShell, dark mode toggle, bits-ui render
bead.description:
Opus Stage 3 batch review (2026-04-15): Stage 3.6 accept was MANUAL-only verification. Only one trivial Playwright e2e exists at src/routes/demo/playwright/page.svelte.e2e.ts. There is no smoke test covering the actual layout shape, dark mode behavior, or bits-ui primitive rendering.

Add a layout smoke spec that (a) loads /, (b) asserts NavShell links exist, (c) toggles dark mode and asserts the <html class> updates, (d) mounts the /demo/ui-primitives page and asserts bits-ui Button is rendered with correct role attributes.
bead.acceptance: (1) New e2e test file covers the 4 cases. (2) bun run test:e2e passes the new spec. (3) Runs clean in CI (no hardcoded timeouts > 2s).
